sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27540" key="ditro/xaios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐ-τρόχαιος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n27540.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">double trochee,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:3:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.3</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2054.tlg001:1:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
